name: MacParakeet Pop Palette
philosophy: 12 colors anchored on the coral-orange brand accent. Pop in spirit (Warhol, MoMA print culture), restrained in execution (calm, confident, minimal). Every color reads cleanly against both the Ink anchor and the Paper anchor; every color pairs with the Coral brand accent; every color tiles next to every other color in a grid.

ink.role: Near-black brand anchor. Use for text, dark backgrounds, the line mark on light grounds, and as the dominant color in 'quiet' compositions.

paper.role: Warm cream brand anchor. Use for light backgrounds, the bird on dark grounds, and to give the palette breathing room.

coral.role: Brand accent (parakeet plumage). Matches DesignSystem.Colors.accent in-app. Always present in any composition that wants brand fidelity.

pop.name: marigold
pop.note: Warm gold. Sibling to coral on the warm side; honey-bright.

pop.name: lemon
pop.note: Highlight yellow. Pops on Ink, struggles on Paper — pair with dark grounds.

pop.name: lime
pop.note: Fresh mid-green. Bridges yellow and forest.

pop.name: forest
pop.note: Deep emerald. Anchor green; reads as the calmest of the pop colors.

pop.name: aqua
pop.note: Warhol turquoise. Coral's complement — the strongest visual partner for the brand accent.

pop.name: cobalt
pop.note: Rich blue anchor. Provides structural contrast under any warm hue.

pop.name: lavender
pop.note: Softer pop. Balances the palette — keeps it from reading as 'fruit market'.

pop.name: magenta
pop.note: Hot pink. Warhol staple. Use sparingly — one tile per grid is plenty.

pop.name: brick
pop.note: Deep red-orange. Coral's grown-up sibling; grounding warm.

guidance.tile-pairs: For Warhol-style tiles, choose a 'ground' (background) and a 'figure' (parakeet). Either may be any palette color. Strongest pairs: aqua+coral, magenta+lemon, cobalt+marigold, forest+paper, brick+lavender, ink+marigold.
guidance.restraint: A 12-tile grid does NOT require 12 different colors. A 12-tile grid using 4 colors arranged in a rhythm reads more 'considered' than 12 unique tiles. Pop with discipline.
guidance.brand-fidelity: If a composition is brand-anchored (website hero, product page, app store), make sure coral or ink-on-paper appears prominently. Pop variants are for moments — anniversaries, launches, social campaigns — not for chrome.
guidance.do-not: Do not introduce gradients, drop shadows, glows, or 'glassmorphism' on top of these colors. Pop = flat color fields. The bird and the ground are the only two layers.
